page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t1.small is an entry-level virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.t1 server family. It is built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and runs on the KVM hypervisor. The instance features a single dedicated physical core with one thread, providing exactly 1 vCPU. It is equipped with 1.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a memory-to-CPU ratio of 1.0 GB per core. The hardware profile does not include any local storage or integrated GPUs, and it lacks advanced CPU instruction sets such as AVX, AVX512, AMX, and hardware-assisted cryptography extensions.

Due to the absence of local storage and advanced vector or cryptographic instructions, this instance is designed for basic, non-computationally intensive tasks. It offers a highly cost-efficient profile for minimal resource requirements, prioritizing low-overhead operations over high-throughput processing. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent single-core execution without resource contention from other tenants on the host. This server type is suited for lightweight utility workloads, simple scripting, basic web hosting, or small-scale development and testing environments that do not require high memory capacity or local disk I/O.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t1.small is an entry-level x86_64 virtual machine within the ecs.t1 family, operating on the KVM hypervisor. It features 1 vCPU backed by a single dedicated physical core and 1.0 GB of system memory. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and its CPU lacks advanced instruction sets such as AVX, AVX512, and hardware cryptography. Designed for minimal resource footprints, it provides a highly cost-efficient option for workloads with low CPU and memory demands. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures stable, predictable single-core performance. This instance is best suited for lightweight utility tasks, basic scripting, simple web serving, and development or testing environments that do not require high-performance computing or local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t1.small is an entry-level x86_64 virtual machine featuring 1 vCPU, 1.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for lightweight utility workloads and basic development tasks.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t1.small is a budget-friendly x86_64 instance with 1 vCPU, 1.0 GB RAM, and no local storage, ideal for basic utility workloads.
tagline: An entry-level, single-core virtual machine with dedicated CPU allocation and minimal memory for lightweight utility and development workloads.
bullet_points: Single dedicated x86_64 CPU core with 1 vCPU
1.0 GB of system memory with no local storage
Lacks advanced CPU extensions like AVX and cryptography flags
Best suited for lightweight scripting, basic web serving, and testing
